commit.message: feat(web): добавить read-only stepper блоков N1
commit.pr_title: feat(web): добавить read-only stepper блоков N1

pr_body_ru:
## Цель
- Добавить in-memory read-only stepper для уже загруженных блоков N1 в mounted `/profile/session`.
- Не создавать прогресс, не отправлять start/submit/completion/analytics/points/rewards и не менять backend/API contract.

## Scope после PASS
- Stepper рендерится из существующего `lessonDetail.blocks`.
- Previous/next меняют только mounted UI state.
- First-start, read-only reopen и status refresh остаются рабочими.
- Token remains only in mounted component memory.
- Canonical docs: NOOP_EXPECTED.

## Проверки
- web test/typecheck/build
- browser/API smoke with 40 screenshots and request-event proof
- api-client generated/OpenAPI/typecheck/build checks
- make verify, make test-unit, make build
- guardrail scans, jq, git diff --check
- Fresh verifier PASS: `.agent/stages/mvp/verdicts/MVP-06-07-n1-readonly-block-stepper-001.json`
- Browser stepper proof: `.agent/stages/mvp/raw/verifier-MVP-06-07-n1-readonly-block-stepper-001-20260514-fresh/browser-smoke/MVP-06-07-n1-readonly-block-stepper-001-verifier-browser-smoke.json`

## Границы
- Full MVP-06, full MVP-07, MVP stage and human gates remain open.
- No backend/API/schema/OpenAPI/generated-client changes.
- No scoring, R1-R6, HR reports, analytics/events, points/rewards, learning completion, quiz/practice submission, advice, exact sensitive data or customer brand.
